reviews.review_msg: Class environment feels like an entrapment and it seems forced

Warning students about serious professionalism concerns. Inappropriate interactions initiated in this class toward a student outside the context of coursework. It crossed professional boundaries and creating stressful situations regardless. I would strongly advise students to be careful and to document any interactions that feel uncomfortable.

Doesn't have the balls to step in and educate his students about ethics. People can just do whatever in front of him and he's going to let it slide because he's intimidated by his own students. What a goof.
Don't take this course if you don't wanna be harassed
Buddy can't even control his own students.

good person, lectures are decent and can be engaging, overall funny and caring, but definitely one of the hardest markers i had for a prof. small number of huge assignments due, most being group projects. coding system was outdated.

The class material was in no way changed to accommodate the switch to online learning. The assignment questions were not clear and left the entire class confused. The class average is the lowest I have ever seen in a 4th year hsci class, which reflects the professor and lab instructor's inability to do their job.

Throughout this semester, Bohdan has been super helpful and very accommodating. He gives extensions if you need, and is always available for questions and is open to feedback. This is by no means an easy class, it's 4 credits and you definitely get out of it what you put in.

Please do yourself a favour and never take this course. I had to take it in order to graduate on time but it was by far the worst class I have ever taken in my years as a hsci major. The lecture material is super dry, the SAS assignments are super unclear with tough questions that confuse the whole class, especially since everything was online.
